title: VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF ODHS Vocational Rehabilitation (VR) assists individuals with disabilities in getting and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities. VR services include vocational counseling, evaluation, physical restoration, skills training, job placement, and preparation for independent living. Services are provided in collaboration with businesses, state agencies, community rehabilitation programs, and independent living service providers. 500 Summer Street NE Suite E87 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Must have a documented physical, mental, or emotional condition that makes it difficult to get or keep a job Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 945-5880 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 945-5880 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Documentation regarding disability LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Vocational Rehabilitation Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OREGON STATE REHABILITATION COUNCIL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE
